recommendations.title: A Man and a Woman
recommendations.overview: A man and a woman meet by accident on a Sunday evening at their childrens' boarding school. Slowly, they reveal themselves to each other, finding that they have something deeply in common.

recommendations.title: Un + une
recommendations.overview: A successful film composer falls in love when he travels to India to work on a Bollywood retelling of Romeo and Juliet.

recommendations.title: Itinerary of a Spoiled Child
recommendations.overview: A foundling, raised in the circus, Sam Lion becomes a businessman after a trapeze accident. However, when he reaches fifty and becomes tired of his responsibilities and of his son Jean-Philippe, he decides to disappear at sea. However, he runs into A

recommendations.title: September 11
recommendations.overview: An anthology of short films inspired by the events of the September 11 World Trade Center attacks.
recommendations.director: Ken Loach, Shōhei Imamura, Samira Makhmalbaf, Idrissa Ouedraogo, Alejandro González Iñárritu, Claude Lelouch, Amos Gitai, Sean Penn, Danis Tanović, Youssef Chahine, Mira Nair

recommendations.title: Boyz n the Hood
recommendations.overview: In the middle of the Los Angeles ghetto, drugs, robberies and shootings dominate everyday life. During these times, Furious tries to raise his son Tre to be a decent person. Tre's friends, on the other hand, have little regard for the law and drag th

recommendations.title: All Your Faces
recommendations.overview: Since 2014, France's restorative justice programmes have offered a safe space for supervised dialogue between offenders and victims. Grégoire, Nawelle, and Sabine, victims of heists and violent robberies, agree to join one of these discussion groups

recommendations.title: Kelly's Heroes
recommendations.overview: A misfit group of World War II American soldiers goes AWOL to rob a bank behind German lines.

recommendations.title: Ice Age: Dawn of the Dinosaurs
recommendations.overview: Times are changing for Manny the moody mammoth, Sid the motor mouthed sloth and Diego the crafty saber-toothed tiger. Life heats up for our heroes when they meet some new and none-too-friendly neighbors – the mighty dinosaurs.

recommendations.title: Flypaper
recommendations.overview: A man caught in the middle of two simultaneous robberies at a bank desperately tries to protect the teller with whom he's secretly in love.

recommendations.title: To Each His Own Cinema
